# TheCOdex Software Solutions

TheCOdex Software Solutions is a software development company based in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India.

Also known as: Thecodex, The Codex, Codex, Codex Software Solutions, Thecodex Software Solutions.

Relevant search intent: software development firm, software development company, web app development company, custom software development company, SaaS development company, business automation company, website development company, web development company in Bhopal, software company in Bhopal.

Primary website: https://thecodexss.in/

Core services:
- Custom web application development
- SaaS product development
- Business automation systems
- Web app management and maintenance
- Google Ads management
- Social media management
